commands.name: csharp-from-json-schema
commands.description:
Generate C# classes from a json schema, using
[NJsonSchema](https://github.com/RicoSuter/NJ
sonSchema).

commands.name: mermaid-c4component-diagram-from-dotnet-deps-json
commands.description:
Generate a Mermaid C4 Component diagram from
a .Net deps.json file.

commands.name: mermaid-class-diagram-from-csharp
commands.description:
Generate a Mermaid Class diagram from a C#
assembly using reflection.

commands.name: mermaid-class-diagram-from-json-schema
commands.description:
Generate a Mermaid Class diagram from a json
schema.

commands.name: mermaid-er-diagram-from-csharp
commands.description:
Generate a Mermaid Entity Relationship
diagram from a C# assembly using reflection.

commands.name: mermaid-er-diagram-from-efcore
commands.description:
Generate a Mermaid Entity Relationship
diagram from a C# assembly using Entity
Framework Core.

commands.name: mermaid-er-diagram-from-json-schema
commands.description:
Generate a Mermaid Entity Relationship
diagram from a Json shcema.

commands.name: options-from-commandline
commands.description:
Generate dry-gen options for a verb from the
command line.
